standards.title: Revenue from Contracts with Customers
keyDifferences: Includes specific carve-outs/carve-ins by the MCA in India, especially regarding accounting for penalties.

standards.title: Leases
keyDifferences: Follows the single-model approach of IFRS 16 (all treated as finance leases for the lessee).

standards.title: Financial Instruments
keyDifferences: Convergent with IFRS 9 with specific transitional exemptions and modifications by the MCA for the Indian market.
